name: Mathmech Circular
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>斬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>キ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>サーキュラー
desc: You can send 1 "Mathmech" monster, except "Mathmech Circular", from your Deck to your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you can only attack with 1 monster for the rest of this turn. If a "Mathmech" monster is Normal or Special Summoned to your field while you control this monster (except during the Damage Step): You can add 1 "Mathmech" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Mathmech Circular" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can send 1 "Mathmech" monster, except "Mathmech Circular", from your Deck to your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you can only attack with 1 monster for the rest of this turn. If a "Mathmech" monster is Normal or Special Summoned to your field while you control this monster (except during the Damage Step): You can add 1 "Mathmech" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Mathmech Circular" once per turn.
eff: You can send 1 "Mathmech" monster, except "Mathmech Circular", from your Deck to your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you can only attack with 1 monster for the rest of this turn. If a "Mathmech" monster is Normal or Special Summoned to your field while you control this monster (except during the Damage Step): You can add 1 "Mathmech" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Mathmech Circular" once per turn.

action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
